questions.solution_text: Berilgan: \(4x - 2 = -6\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -6 + 2 = -4\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-4}{4} = -1\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 1 = 4\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 4 + 1 = 5\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{5}{5} = 1\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 0 = 6\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 6 - 0 = 6\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{6}{2} = 3\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 1 = 16\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 16 - 1 = 15\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{15}{3} = 5\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 2 = -22\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -22 - 2 = -24\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-24}{4} = -6\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 3 = -17\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -17 - 3 = -20\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-20}{5} = -4\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 4 = 0\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 0 - 4 = -4\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-4}{2} = -2\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 5 = 5\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 5 - 5 = 0\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{0}{3} = 0\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 5 = 3\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 3 + 5 = 8\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{8}{4} = 2\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 4 = 16\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 16 + 4 = 20\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{20}{5} = 4\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 0 = 10\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 10 - 0 = 10\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{10}{5} = 2\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 1 = 9\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 9 - 1 = 8\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{8}{2} = 4\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 2 = 20\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 20 - 2 = 18\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{18}{3} = 6\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 3 = -17\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -17 - 3 = -20\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-20}{4} = -5\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 4 = -11\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -11 - 4 = -15\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-15}{5} = -3\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 5 = 3\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 3 - 5 = -2\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-2}{2} = -1\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 5 = -2\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -2 + 5 = 3\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{3}{3} = 1\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 4 = 8\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 8 + 4 = 12\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{12}{4} = 3\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 3 = 22\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 22 + 3 = 25\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{25}{5} = 5\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 2 = -14\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -14 + 2 = -12\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-12}{2} = -6\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 2 = 12\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 12 - 2 = 10\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{10}{2} = 5\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 3 = -15\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -15 - 3 = -18\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-18}{3} = -6\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 4 = -12\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -12 - 4 = -16\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-16}{4} = -4\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 5 = -5\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -5 - 5 = -10\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-10}{5} = -2\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 5 = -5\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -5 + 5 = 0\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{0}{2} = 0\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 4 = 2\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 2 + 4 = 6\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{6}{3} = 2\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 3 = 13\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 13 + 3 = 16\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{16}{4} = 4\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 2 = 28\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 28 + 2 = 30\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{30}{5} = 6\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 1 = -11\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -11 + 1 = -10\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-10}{2} = -5\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 0 = -9\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -9 - 0 = -9\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-9}{3} = -3\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 4 = -11\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -11 - 4 = -15\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-15}{3} = -5\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 5 = -7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -7 - 5 = -12\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-12}{4} = -3\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 5 = -10\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -10 + 5 = -5\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-5}{5} = -1\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 4 = -2\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -2 + 4 = 2\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{2}{2} = 1\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 3 = 6\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 6 + 3 = 9\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{9}{3} = 3\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 2 = 18\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 18 + 2 = 20\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{20}{4} = 5\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 1 = -31\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -31 + 1 = -30\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-30}{5} = -6\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 0 = -8\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -8 - 0 = -8\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-8}{2} = -4\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 1 = -5\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -5 - 1 = -6\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-6}{3} = -2\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 2 = 2\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 2 - 2 = 0\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{0}{4} = 0\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 5 = -13\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -13 + 5 = -8\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-8}{4} = -2\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 4 = -4\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -4 + 4 = 0\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{0}{5} = 0\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 3 = 1\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 1 + 3 = 4\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{4}{2} = 2\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 2 = 10\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 10 + 2 = 12\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{12}{3} = 4\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 1 = 23\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 23 + 1 = 24\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{24}{4} = 6\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 0 = -25\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -25 - 0 = -25\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-25}{5} = -5\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 1 = -5\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -5 - 1 = -6\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-6}{2} = -3\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 2 = -1\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -1 - 2 = -3\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-3}{3} = -1\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 3 = 7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 7 - 3 = 4\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{4}{4} = 1\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 4 = 19\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 19 - 4 = 15\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{15}{5} = 3\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 3 = 2\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 2 + 3 = 5\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{5}{5} = 1\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 2 = 4\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 4 + 2 = 6\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{6}{2} = 3\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 1 = 14\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 14 + 1 = 15\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{15}{3} = 5\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 0 = -24\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -24 - 0 = -24\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-24}{4} = -6\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 1 = -19\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -19 - 1 = -20\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-20}{5} = -4\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 2 = -2\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -2 - 2 = -4\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-4}{2} = -2\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 3 = 3\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 3 - 3 = 0\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{0}{3} = 0\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 4 = 12\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 12 - 4 = 8\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{8}{4} = 2\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 5 = 25\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 25 - 5 = 20\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{20}{5} = 4\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 5 = 7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 7 + 5 = 12\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{12}{2} = 6\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 1 = 7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 7 + 1 = 8\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{8}{2} = 4\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 0 = 18\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 18 - 0 = 18\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{18}{3} = 6\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 1 = -19\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -19 - 1 = -20\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-20}{4} = -5\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 2 = -13\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -13 - 2 = -15\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-15}{5} = -3\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 3 = 1\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 1 - 3 = -2\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-2}{2} = -1\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 4 = 7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 7 - 4 = 3\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{3}{3} = 1\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 5 = 17\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 17 - 5 = 12\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{12}{4} = 3\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 5 = 20\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 20 + 5 = 25\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{25}{5} = 5\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 4 = -16\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -16 + 4 = -12\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-12}{2} = -6\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 3 = -15\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -15 + 3 = -12\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-12}{3} = -4\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 1 = -17\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -17 - 1 = -18\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-18}{3} = -6\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 2 = -14\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -14 - 2 = -16\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-16}{4} = -4\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 3 = -7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -7 - 3 = -10\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-10}{5} = -2\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 4 = 4\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 4 - 4 = 0\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{0}{2} = 0\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 5 = 11\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 11 - 5 = 6\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{6}{3} = 2\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 5 = 11\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 11 + 5 = 16\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{16}{4} = 4\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 4 = 26\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 26 + 4 = 30\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{30}{5} = 6\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 3 = -13\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -13 + 3 = -10\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-10}{2} = -5\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 2 = -11\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -11 + 2 = -9\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-9}{3} = -3\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 1 = -5\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -5 + 1 = -4\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-4}{4} = -1\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 3 = -9\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = -9 - 3 = -12\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-12}{4} = -3\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 4 = -1\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -1 - 4 = -5\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-5}{5} = -1\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 5 = 7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 7 - 5 = 2\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{2}{2} = 1\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 5 = 4\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 4 + 5 = 9\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{9}{3} = 3\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 4 = 16\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 16 + 4 = 20\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{20}{4} = 5\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 3 = -33\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -33 + 3 = -30\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-30}{5} = -6\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 2 = -10\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -10 + 2 = -8\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-8}{2} = -4\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 1 = -7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -7 + 1 = -6\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-6}{3} = -2\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 0 = 0\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 0 - 0 = 0\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{0}{4} = 0\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 1 = 11\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 11 - 1 = 10\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{10}{5} = 2\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 5 = 5\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 5 - 5 = 0\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{0}{5} = 0\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 5 = -1\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -1 + 5 = 4\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{4}{2} = 2\).
Berilgan: \(3x - 4 = 8\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = 8 + 4 = 12\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{12}{3} = 4\).
Berilgan: \(4x - 3 = 21\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 21 + 3 = 24\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{24}{4} = 6\).
Berilgan: \(5x - 2 = -27\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = -27 + 2 = -25\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-25}{5} = -5\).
Berilgan: \(2x - 1 = -7\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = -7 + 1 = -6\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-6}{2} = -3\).
Berilgan: \(3x + 0 = -3\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(3x = -3 - 0 = -3\). Ikkala tomonni \(3\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{-3}{3} = -1\).
Berilgan: \(4x + 1 = 5\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(4x = 5 - 1 = 4\). Ikkala tomonni \(4\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{4}{4} = 1\).
Berilgan: \(5x + 2 = 17\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(5x = 17 - 2 = 15\). Ikkala tomonni \(5\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{15}{5} = 3\).
Berilgan: \(2x + 3 = 13\). Ozod hadni o'ng tomonga o'tkazamiz: \(2x = 13 - 3 = 10\). Ikkala tomonni \(2\) ga bo'lamiz: \(x = \dfrac{10}{2} = 5\).
